font_stack: Astro Fonts build-time provider: subset local WOFF2 for Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans + Noto Sans SC; no runtime Google Fonts requests
palette: custom near-white / blue-ink / neutral graphite OKLCH
motion: three restrained primitives: hero reveal, one-shot development diagram assembly, and command selection indicator; the side rail uses color-only state feedback and reduced motion removes spatial transitions
finding: Replaced the repeated Split Studio sequence with an Ecosystem Index rhythm: a full-width manifesto, asymmetric project catalog, one intentional construction split, a 2-by-2 governance matrix, and a closing action rail. Preserved the existing content, tokens, navigation, SVG craft, footer, and interaction system.
responsive: verified at 320 / 375 / 414 / 768 / 1280 CSS px with no horizontal overflow and no visible target below 44px
